craigslist.title: Gold Coast 1BD w/Roof Deck, Pool, 24hr Door Staff, & Fitness Center!
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post Call Apartment Guys at 773-549-3474 and ask for reference #1024550. Large rehabbed Gold Coast one bed on quiet tree lined street! This apartment features large floor-to-ceiling windows that let in lots of sunlight, plentiful closet space, a spacious floor plan and an updated kitchen with a dishwasher. Building amenities include a 24hr door staff, roof deck, outdoor pool, fitness center and extra storage lockers. Located in the heart of the Gold Coast, within walking distance to the lake, shops, restaurants, nightlife, bus lines and the EL. Prices are subject to change. ***Photos may be of a similar unit.****For faster response best to call or text 773-549-3474 with reference #1024550

craigslist.title: Sunny 2BR in Soundview | Hardwood Floors • High Ceilings!
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post This bright and spacious residence offers modern finishes, an updated kitchen and bathroom, stylish flooring, and a clean, comfortable layout that's ready for you to move right in. Perfectly situated with exceptional convenience, this apartment provides quick access to Bronx River Parkway, the Cross Bronx Expressway, Bruckner Expressway, and is within easy reach of the George Washington Bridge, RFK Bridge, Whitestone Bridge, and Throgs Neck Bridge making commuting throughout the Bronx, Manhattan, Queens, and Westchester simple and convenient. Apartment Features: Renovated 2-bedroom layout Modern kitchen with updated cabinetry and appliances Marble with contemporary finishes Bright, spacious rooms with abundant natural light Beautiful updated flooring throughout Clean, move-in-ready condition Conveniently located, this property offers quick access to major highways and public transportation, along with proximity to shopping, restaurants, supermarkets, schools, and parks. It ensures an easy commute to Manhattan, Queens, and Westchester. Don't miss the opportunity to live in this beautifully updated apartment in a highly convenient Bronx location. If you want to see the apartment, just send your number and I’ll arrange it.

Rent: $2,490/month I'm looking for a subletter to take over my lease, which ends May 30, 2027, with the option to extend. Spacious, sunny 8th-floor corner unit in a well-maintained elevator building with excellent management. I've loved living here for over a year now and am only moving because I'm moving in with a partner. Looking for someone to take over my lease, ending 5/30/2027 with option to extend

craigslist.title: Super Affordable Condo for rent! Can be rented partially furnished!
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post Call Apartment Guys at 773-549-3474 and ask for reference #2203476. This Uptown Condo is priced well AND includes cable, internet, water, cooking gas and heat in the monthly rent! It has a modern kitchen with a dishwasher and tiled floors. Sized at approx 500 sq ft and located right across the street from the lakefront and park, where there is a Field House (membership required) with a gym, basketball court and other activities as well as just a few blocks to either the Foster or Montrose Beaches! There also is a metered parking lot across the street to make parking convenient for visitors or guests! Catch either one of the several express buses such as the 146,147 or catch a train at either the Lawrence or Argyle Red lines stops that are both just 3-4 blocks away. Or grab one of the Lyft Bikes conveniently located nearby! Walk to the Uptown nightlife district with the Aragon Ballroom, Riviera Theater and hear live music at the famous Green Mill Lounge. This building also has an elevator, bike storage and an extra storage locker! Prices are subject to change. **Photos may be of a similar unit or example of units.****For faster response best to call or text 773-549-3474 with reference #2203476

craigslist.title: 140 Dean St - Charming Boerum Hill 1BR Apartment
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post Welcome home to this beautiful and spacious one-bedroom apartment located at 140 Dean St, Brooklyn, NY 11217, in the heart of Boerum Hill. From the moment you walk through the front door, you'll appreciate the bright, welcoming atmosphere and comfortable layout that truly makes this place feel like home. This well-maintained apartment blends modern updates with everyday convenience. Hardwood floors run throughout the home, leading into a bright living area and an updated kitchen with ample cabinet space and modern appliances. The spacious bedroom offers generous closet space and plenty of room to relax after a long day. Large windows fill the apartment with natural light, creating a warm and inviting environment. Thoughtfully designed and move-in ready, this home is ideal for anyone looking for comfort, style, and practical city living. Conveniently located near shopping, restaurants, cafés, parks, and public transportation, you'll have everything you need just minutes from your doorstep. Feel free to share your contact information if you'd like to schedule a private showing.

craigslist.title: Beautiful Rogers Park 2bd/ba condo, pet friendly
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post 2 Bed / 2 Bath with spacious open-plan living room and kitchen, located at Pratt and Ashland Blvd. This beautiful first-floor apartment in Rogers Park features a large living space suitable for both dining and living room areas, two large bedrooms (one with a half-wall built-in bookshelf), a master bath with functional jets in the tub and another bathroom with a shower. The apartment is 1,100 sq. ft. and includes a storage unit in the basement, along with easy access to the alley out back. Each bedroom includes plenty of closet space. Conveniently located a 5 minute walk from the Morse Red Line station and Morse Fresh market grocery, or 5 minutes in the other direction to Clark street and numerous delicious restaurants, and a 15 minute walk from the beach. Start date: Aug 1 Rent: $1,950 per month Features: ⁃ In-unit washer and dryer ⁃ Central AC and heating ⁃ 2 full bathrooms! ⁃ Dishwasher ⁃ Microwave ⁃ Built in bookcase ⁃ Basement storage unit ⁃ Pets allowed ⁃ Beautiful front courtyard

craigslist.title: 🏡MINUTES FROM HYDE PARK & LOOP: 1BR/1BA Apt w/ Heat & Water Included
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post Description Newly renovated spacious 1 bedroom, 1 bathroom apartment available in Hyde Park/Kenwood - Boulevard Address. Apartment includes: Great natural light, hardwood flooring throughout, French doors off the living room, stainless steel appliances including microwave, great closet space, doorbells with intercoms. Rent: $1,500 - heat and water included in the rent Vintage, well manicured building with on-site management, security cameras, laundry facility, and bike room. Off-street parking lot located to the north of the building with assigned parking for extra monthly fee, while spots available. 5 minutes from the University of Chicago; 10 minutes from the Loop Excellent public transportation, short distance to Lake Shore Drive. Both University of Chicago Police and CPD service area. Rent: $1,500 - heat and water included in the rent Call Redel Rentals at (773) 819-9216 to schedule a viewing appointment For more information, visit - https://www.redelrentals.com/buildings/43rd-drexel-blvd 4336-44 S. Drexel Blvd. property accommodates residents looking for studio, one, and two bedroom apartments. On-site management with nearly 50 years experience; office is located in the main building at 43rd and Drexel. - Beautifully manicured courtyard building with 24-hour security surveillance cameras, on-site laundry facility, bike room, and assigned parking on lot to north of building. - Property is walking distance from parks, cafes, as well as burgeoning retail shops and restaurants, like Bronzeville Winery. Lakefront access is a 10 min walk from the 43rd St. Pedestrian Bridge; 20 min walk to Oakwood Beach. - Less than 2 miles from University of Chicago (to the south); less than 2 miles from IIT (to the northwest); less than 4.5 miles from University of Illinois - Chicago (to the northwest); less than 4.5 miles from Columbia College (to the north). - CTA's #43 bus stop is located at 43rd St. and Drexel Blvd. and the #4 bus stop is conveniently located right around the corner at 43rd St. and Cottage Grove Ave. The CTA "L" Green line train is also within close proximity. Call 773-819-9216 for more information! Features Hardwood floors Refrigerator Walk-in closets Stove and oven Heat Ceiling fan Controlled access Courtyard Mirrors View Window coverings Cat friendly Laundry room Parking Lake access On-site management Recycling

craigslist.title: South Loop luxury Studio with views of Lake Michigan
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post Stunning Luxury High-Rise Living on Michigan Avenue | Unbeatable Grant Park & Lake Views | Studios to 4BR Penthouses Rise above it all in one of downtown Chicago's most talked-about new luxury towers, perched on iconic South Michigan Avenue directly across from Grant Park. Designed by a world-renowned architect with interiors by a celebrated Chicago designer, this striking glass high-rise offers completely unobstructed views of Lake Michigan, Grant Park, Millennium Park, and the downtown skyline from floor-to-ceiling windows in every home. Choose from thoughtfully designed studios and convertibles, one-bedrooms (some with dens), spacious two- and three-bedrooms, and jaw-dropping four-bedroom penthouses with 360° panoramas. Every residence features designer kitchens, premium fixtures, elevated finishes, and abundant natural light. Select studios include custom floor-to-ceiling bookshelf dividers and built-in desks — perfect for remote work. You're steps from the Loop, the lakefront trail, Museum Campus, Millennium Park, world-class dining, and the Cultural Mile. This is the rare address that delivers big-city energy and a private, elevated retreat all at once. Features & Amenities 80,000+ sq ft of indoor and outdoor amenity space — among the largest in downtown Chicago Private 73rd-floor rooftop observation deck — the highest residential vantage point in the city Wintergarden with year-round swimming Two-story state-of-the-art fitness and wellness center overlooking the park and lake Floor-to-ceiling windows with lake, park, and skyline views Designer kitchens and premium finish packages in every unit Studio, convertible, 1BR, 1BR+den, 2BR, 3BR, and 4BR penthouse floor plans Beautiful Co-working Spaces Pet friendly Professional on-site management MOVE IN SPECIAL: up to 1 month free on select apartments* Why Work With Us? This listing is brought to you by LoopLuxuryLiving.com — Chicago's free, concierge-style luxury apartment locating service. We specialize exclusively in downtown's premier neighborhoods: the Loop, South Loop, Fulton Market, and Streeterville. Our service costs you absolutely nothing — we're compensated by the buildings, not by you. craigslist.title: 19th Floor 1BR-1.5BA + DEN with views & more - FURNISHED
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post AVAILABLE Sept 2 -- if this ad is still up, please contact us. Fantastic, FULLY FURNISHED, beautiful, 1 bed, den, 1.5 baths, with great views, doorman building, $2445 (parking available for additional monthly fee, if you need it) Rare opportunity to move into turn-key fully furnished and equipped condo apartment, move-in immaculate condition person looking for downtown Chicago apartment. Modern, high rise condo building, complete amenities, $2,445/month includes most utilities (high-speed internet and cable). Tenant(s) responsible for electric. Apartment: Fully furnished in all rooms, move-in condition. Spacious 1077 sf Move in ready with complete kitchen equipment and bed/bath supplies High floor with stunning city views Large terrace (spectacular 4th of July viewing) Wood floors in living areas (except carpet in BR) Open kitchen, granite counters, dishwasher, gas stove/oven, dishes/silverware/pots & pans Washer/Dryer in Unit Guest half-bathroom/powder room Master bedroom with private en suite bathroom Private den/office/guest room with french doors for privacy Workout and weight room on premises Large pool and sundeck Business office on premises For hygiene and public health purposes, you would have to provide your own linens & towels Location: * Centrally located near (Roosevelt "L" CTA train stop for Red, Orange and Green lines) for easy travel to Midway, O'Hare, U of Chicago, suburbs and of course downtown and inner city areas * 1 block off Michigan Avenue * If you run or hike, you are one block from the park/lake trails -- run or bike along Lake Michigan/Grant Park * Short walk to downtown business district, Lake Michigan, Soldier Field, Field museum, Aquarium, Planetarium, Chicago Institute of Art * Very near/walk to: Trader Joes, Whole Foods, Osco, Target, Starbucks, Walgreens, Home Depot, Best Buy & more * Fantastic restaurants within steps (too many to count) Lease requirement: Minimum 12 months (through August 31, 2026). Tenant(s) suitability: This unit is in top shape. NO pets, smokers or illegal drug use, and NO AirBnB, subleasing, or assignment of lease. Please respond by email with: 1) Your name(s) 2) Phone and email contact information where we can reach you 3) Current address 4) Current living situation (and why you'd like to move to this apartment?) 5) Any other information that you'd like to share about yourself (we told you a lot about this unit, so we'd like to hear about you) Please note that because our rent of $2,445 includes beautiful furnishings, our price can't be compared to other rentals for unfurnished apartments. For this location, size of apartment, outdoor views and more, you can't beat this! And if you have a car, parking in the building garage (accessible by the building elevator) is available as stated above for an added amount.

craigslist.title: Lincoln Park Apartment for Rent
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post Check out our 1 bed/1 bath Lincoln Park unit! This south-facing fourth floor unit features PLENTY of closet space, stainless steel appliances, a one-minute walk from the Fullerton Red/Brown/Purple CTA station, and new in-unit washer and dryer. Water and heating/cooking gas are provided by the HOA and are included in the tenant's rent. Tenant will be responsible for their electricity and WiFi/Cable. Pets are allowed, with restrictions. The building has Parcel Pending lockers for your delivery packages, a Butterfly system for secure entry into the building, a storage room with your own storage locker, and a bike room. This is an elevator building! Available for a August 1st move-in. Tours to be scheduled the week of July 6th. Additional information: - There is NO security deposit. Non-refundable move-in fee is $700, non-refundable move-out fee is $700. Tenant is responsible for HOA moving fees. - Tenant will have to pay first month's rent, move-in fee, and associated HOA moving fees within 72 business hours of an executed lease. - Tenant will need to provide proof of renter's insurance. - Please inquire for an application if you are interested. Applications are about $75 and paid directly to the service used (we receive no income from this process).

craigslist.title: AFFORDABLE Cute Modern Studios IN PRIME UPTOWN ONLY A FEW LEFT
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post PROPERTY INFO ID: 268940065 Rent: $1,150 / Month Beds: 0 Bath: 1 Available Date: 07/01/2026 Pet: Pet Friendly Parking:: street parking Former Vintage Uptown Hotel Now Completely Renovated Studios and 1 Bedrooms! * This historic gem underwent a massive gut rehab and conversion and now boasts 48 gorgeous studio and one bedroom apartments. * Completely renovated apartments that feature stainless steel kitchen appliances, beautiful new plumbing fixtures, 9′ high ceilings, large showers, & in-unit washer and dryer in select units. * Vintage building maintains all of the historic charm on the exterior Located in happening location at Leland and Racine * Walking distance to several great parks like Gooseberry Playlot Park, Aster Playlot Park, Arai Campus Park and Chase park. * Venture a little further east and you can walk to Montrose Beach, Montrose Dog Beach, Clarendon Park Community Center, and The Margate Fieldhouse. * Near some of the most famous music venues in Chicago including The Green Mill, The Riviera Theater, and The Aragon Ballroom. * Other popular neighborhood spots are Gigio’s Pizzeria, The Baton Show Lounge, Demera, Uptown Bikes, and Fat Cat Restaurant. * You’ll love being two blocks from Aldi, and Target for all of your daily necessities. Enjoy the convenience of public transportation when you live at The Darlington Apartments. * The Lawrence CTA train station with Red Line service is one block away to the north. The Wilson CTA train station is about 2 blocks south on Broadway. * At this station you will find service on the Red Line and Purple Line. * CTA bus routes nearby include: 36, 81, 151 * If you walk east to Marine Drive, you will find CTA bus routes: 136, 146, 148. Schools close to The Darlington Apartments are McCutcheon Elementary School, Lourdes School, Courtney School, Goudy School, James McPherson Public School, Chicago Waldorf School, and The Bridge International School. FEATURES Cats Ok On-Site Laundry Small Dog OK Storage

craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post Clean, quiet 2-bedroom apartment available now in Woodlawn. ✔ Section 8 Welcome ✔ Will accept 1 bedroom voucher for 2 bedroom unit ✔ Move-in fee waived for voucher holders ✔ Ready for inspection immediately ✔ Fast approval and responsive management ✔ No security deposit ✔ Heat and water included ✔ Laundry in Building This is a well-maintained building with on-site maintenance, so repairs are handled quickly - often same day. craigslist.title: Gold Coast 1 Bedroom with in unit laundry & hardwood flooring
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post PROPERTY INFO ID: 231500082 Rent: $2,530 / Month Beds: 1 Bath: 1 Pet: Pet Friendly Parking:: attached garage To qualify all applicants must have: -Ability to provide proof of income with past 2 paystubs or 3 months of bank statements that are (minimum&total) 3x amount of market rent. -Minimum credit score of 650 with no delinquencies (Co-signers are allowed for assistance in credit approval). For me to better assist you, please have the answers to the following questions: When is your move date?(is it flexible, if so how far in either direction)? Any pets(weight and breed)? Need parking? Budget(just rent)? What neighborhoods are you primarily interested in? Have you toured any properties yet?(so that I don't double up on my research) When are you available for a showing? For fastest response, please call or text Molly at 312-805-6567 Chicago’s historic Astor Street District in the Gold Coast welcomed this new luxury apartment building in 2020. An ode to refined elegance, this contemporary building boasts unparalleled character, fantastic proximity to downtown and the lake, and loads of luxury living in one of the city’s most prestigious neighborhoods. Commuting is easy with the CTA Chicago Red line station just steps from your door, in addition to several bus routes. You’ll also have immediate access to Lake Shore Drive less than 5 minutes away. craigslist.title: Spacious Charming Gold Coast Convertible/ 1 Bedroom w/ onsite gym
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post PROPERTY INFO ID: 329562508 Rent: $2,250 / Month Beds: 1 Bath: 1 Pet: Dogs Allowed Parking:: attached garage *Price is net effective of current promotion. Advertised pictures are of model unit. Actual unit will be unfurnished, but same floorplan. To qualify all applicants must have: -Ability to provide proof of income with past 2 paystubs or 3 months of bank statements that are (minimum&total) 3x amount of market rent. -Minimum credit score of 650 with no delinquencies (Co-signers are allowed for assistance in credit approval). For me to better assist you, please have the answers to the following questions: When is your move date?(is it flexible, if so how far in either direction)? Any pets(weight and breed)? Need parking? Budget(just rent)? What neighborhoods are you primarily interested in? Have you toured any properties yet?(so that I don't double up on my research) When are you available for a showing? For fastest response, please call or text Molly at 312-805-6567 Now there’s even more to love about Old Town! If you’re looking for luxury and amenities within a smaller building and love having a bustling community right outside your front door, this new mid-rise might be perfect for you! Check out a convertible, one bedroom or two bedroom layout here and then explore the plethora of options to shop, dine out, grab a drink, or see a show within this charming and popular neighborhood. The apartments here are stunning, spacious layouts adorned with oak-toned plank flooring. The exposed concrete ceilings add character and an urban edge. In the kitchen, European-style cabinetry complements the sleek quartz countertops, while the bathrooms feature porcelain tile walls and floors, complete with luxurious glass-enclosed showers. Convenience is paramount, thanks to in-unit laundry and custom-built shelving in the closets. This building has some nice amenities for those who work from home; a conference room and various shared and individual workspaces should boost productivity. There’s also a 24/7 coffee bar to provide an extra jolt when needed! Residents can stay fit in the fitness center with a yoga studio, and then unwind on the rooftop deck, taking in the panoramic city views that never get old. Pet owners will delight in the private dog park and grooming station, with additional green spaces like Seward Park and Washington Square Park just a stone's throw away. Public transit is incredibly accessible, with the CTA red line train steps from your door and a variety of bus routes within a 5-minute walk. To top it off, there are three major grocery stores within two blocks of the building! FEATURES Balcony-None Central Air-Yes Dishwasher-All Fitness Center Flooring-Hardwood Only Laundry- W/D In Unit Luxury Property New Property Security-Intercom/Key Fob Smoking-No Stove-Electric Molly Fortune 312-805-6567 Hotspot Rentals, LLC (License #481.011892) Our brokerage provides tenant introductions and representation to renters as part of the leasing process. Advertised pictures are of model unit. Actual unit will be unfurnished, but same floorplan. To qualify all applicants must have: -Ability to provide proof of income with past 2 paystubs or 3 months of bank statements that are (minimum&total) 3x amount of market rent. -Minimum credit score of 650 with no delinquencies (Co-signers are allowed for assistance in credit approval). For me to better assist you, please have the answers to the following questions: When is your move date?(is it flexible, if so how far in either direction)? Any pets(weight and breed)? Need parking? Budget(just rent)? What neighborhoods are you primarily interested in? Have you toured any properties yet?(so that I don't double up on my research) When are you available for a showing? For fastest response, please call or text Molly at 312-805-6567 Now there’s even more to love about Old Town! If you’re looking for luxury and amenities within a smaller building and love having a bustling community right outside your front door, this new mid-rise might be perfect for you! Check out a convertible, one bedroom or two bedroom layout here and then explore the plethora of options to shop, dine out, grab a drink, or see a show within this charming and popular neighborhood. The apartments here are stunning, spacious layouts adorned with oak-toned plank flooring. The exposed concrete ceilings add character and an urban edge. In the kitchen, European-style cabinetry complements the sleek quartz countertops, while the bathrooms feature porcelain tile walls and floors, complete with luxurious glass-enclosed showers. Convenience is paramount, thanks to in-unit laundry and custom-built shelving in the closets. This building has some nice amenities for those who work from home; a conference room and various shared and individual workspaces should boost productivity. There’s also a 24/7 coffee bar to provide an extra jolt when needed! Residents can stay fit in the fitness center with a yoga studio, and then unwind on the rooftop deck, taking in the panoramic city views that never get old. Pet owners will delight in the private dog park and grooming station, with additional green spaces like Seward Park and Washington Square Park just a stone's throw away. Public transit is incredibly accessible, with the CTA red line train steps from your door and a variety of bus routes within a 5-minute walk. To top it off, there are three major grocery stores within two blocks of the building! FEATURES Balcony-None Central Air-Yes Dishwasher-All Fitness Center Flooring-Hardwood Only Laundry- W/D In Unit Luxury Property New Property Security-Intercom/Key Fob Smoking-No Stove-Electric Molly Fortune 312-805-6567 Hotspot Rentals, LLC (License #481.011892) Our brokerage provides tenant introductions and representation to renters as part of the leasing process. We do not charge or collect any fees from tenants and do not handle lease transactions directly. Compensation is received from landlords or property management companies for brokerage services upon successful lease execution. Hotspot Apartment Rentals LLC — Illinois Licensed Real Estate Brokerage (#481.011892), Designated Managing Broker: Dorothy Moody (#471.006436), Virtual Office License Number 495.000153. Office of Record (mailing address only): One North Franklin Street, Suite 1200 Chicago IL 60606, Phone: (312) 782-8404 This website constitutes the virtual office of Hotspot Apartment Rentals LLC as authorized by the Illinois Department of Financial and Professional Regulation (IDFPR) under 225 ILCS 454/5-45(d). Disclaimer: PRICING COULD BE NET EFFECTIVE OF SPECIALS, please ask if there is one. Photos may not be of exact unit available and may be of various model units and various vacant units. Apartment availability and lease terms may vary. Pricing, availability, and specials are subject to change at any time and without notice. Please note that the price may be net effective of a special or concession that the building is currently running. Information is believed to be accurate, however, is subject to errors and omissions. craigslist.title: Fulton Market Studio with in unit washer and dryer, pool and gym!
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post PROPERTY INFO ID: 9049570 Rent: $2,050 / Month Beds: 0 Bath: 1 Pet: Pet Friendly Parking:: attached garage *Price is net effective of current promotion To qualify all applicants must have: - Ability to provide proof of income with past 2 paystubs or 3 months of bank statements that are (minimum&total) 3x amount of market rent. -Minimum credit score of 650 with no delinquencies (Co-signers are allowed for assistance in credit approval). For me to better assist you, please have the answers to the following questions: When is your move date?(is it flexible, if so how far in either direction)? Any pets(weight and breed)? Need parking? Budget(just rent)? What neighborhoods are you primarily interested in? Have you toured any properties yet?(so that I don't double up on my research) When are you available for a showing? For fastest response, please call or text Molly at 312-805-6567! We love this location because it has access to everything without being right in the middle of it. Only 2 blocks to your east and over the river you’ll be in River North, while 4 blocks south puts you in the booming West Loop area. The CTA Blue, Green and Pink Lines are a short walk, as is access to the Metra at the Ogilvie Transportation Center. Jump on the 90/94 Expressway in less than 5 minutes! We also love this property’s amenities, highlighted by the full-size indoor basketball court, large outdoor pool and spa with cabanas and grilling stations, top of the line fitness center, and sauna/steam room. You’ll also find smartly-designed co-working spaces and an on-site restaurant as well as a 24-hour security door staff in this 100% smoke-free building. Starting with the 9’ ceilings, these open designer layouts showcase stainless steel appliances and granite counters in the kitchens and spa-inspired finishes in the bathrooms. In-unit washers and dryers, oversized closets and resident-controlled heating and air conditioning are all part of the luxury features. Select units offer hardwood flooring and private balconies. Parking is available on-site at an additional charge. Cats are accepted throughout and dogs are welcome on select floors (dog breed restrictions apply, but there is no weight limit). craigslist.title: River North Studio,Floor to Ceiling Windows,Hardwood,In Unit W/D, Pool
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post PROPERTY INFO ID: 33397322 Rent: $2346 / Month Beds: 0 Bath: 1 Pet: Pet Friendly Parking:: attached garage *Price is net effective of current promotion To qualify all applicants must have: - Ability to provide proof of income with past 2 paystubs or 3 months of bank statements that are (minimum&total) 3x amount of market rent. -Minimum credit score of 650 with no delinquencies (Co-signers are allowed for assistance in credit approval). For me to better assist you, please have the answers to the following questions: When is your move date?(is it flexible, if so how far in either direction)? Any pets(weight and breed)? Need parking? Budget(just rent)? What neighborhoods are you primarily interested in? Have you toured any properties yet?(so that I don't double up on my research) When are you available for a showing? For fastest response, please call or text Molly at 312-805-6567! This beautiful and contemporary residence is a great example of what we love about modern urban planning. Starting from the top, literally, you’ll enjoy a rooftop pool, sundeck and fire pit, or move down to the 4th floor terrace-style patio for a BBQ at one of the outdoor grilling stations. Inside, the amenities seem nearly endless with a club room, media lounge and game room, fitness center, yoga studio, fireplace and library. Combine this with 4,000 square feet of retail, a neighborhood Walk Score of 99 out of 100, and a 2 block walk to either the CTA Red or Brown/Purple Lines, and it’s easy to see why this property is so desirable. The building is 100% smoke-free, has a 24-hour security door staff, and coming soon, one gigabit capable Wi-Fi. Those same smart folks who designed the outside of this building also did the inside, starting with floor-to-ceiling windows that offer spectacular views in all directions. The interiors are packed with warm, contemporary finishes, including solid horizontal grain European-style cabinets, hardwood laminate floors, Grohe faucets and Whirlpool Energy Star appliances. Each unit comes with 9’ ceilings, in-unit washer and dryer, and central air. Parking is available on-site at an additional charge and there is permit street parking within walking distance. Cats and dogs are accepted throughout and there is a unique, outdoor secure dog run on-site (dog breed restrictions apply, but there is no weight limit). craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post PROPERTY INFO ID: 9049602 Rent: $2,046 / Month Beds: 0 Bath: 1 Pet: Pet Friendly Parking:: attached garage *Price is net effective for current promotion. To qualify all applicants must have: -Ability to provide proof of income with past 2 paystubs or 3 months of bank statements that are (minimum&total) 3x amount of market rent. -Minimum credit score of 650 with no delinquencies (Co-signers are allowed for assistance in credit approval). For fastest response, please call or text Molly at 312-805-6567 If this specific unit does not fit your apartment needs there are a variety of options that would. My services to you are FREE and I look forward to assisting you in the search for your new home! Centrally located in Lakeshore East, this property is super transportation friendly, providing 10-minute walks to all CTA Trains, the Millennium Park Metra Station and Lake Shore Drive. If you are a “walker,” you’re in business! As one of the few apartment buildings connected to the underground Pedway, you’ll enjoy indoor access to restaurants, shops and offices within the Loop. You’ll also be less than 2 blocks away from the Chicago Riverwalk, the Lakefront Trail and Michigan Avenue giving you tons of activities to choose from. When you’re tired of walking, relax at the rooftop sunroom or do some grilling on the ground floor BBQ/picnic area. There’s also a fitness center, internet lounge and bicycle storage in addition to 24-hour security door staffing. Floor-to-ceiling windows, lots of closet space and very generous floor plans highlight these units. Select units have been remodeled with hardwood cabinets and plank flooring in the kitchens. The building offers on-site washers and dryers as well. Parking is available on-site at an additional charge. house_ger.name: Lakeshore East Studio with GORGEOUS City Views
house_ger.msg: QR Code Link to This Post PROPERTY INFO ID: 9049602 Rent: $2,046 / Month Beds: 0 Bath: 1 Pet: Pet Friendly Parking:: attached garage *Price is net effective for current promotion. To qualify all applicants must have: -Ability to provide proof of income with past 2 paystubs or 3 months of bank statements that are (minimum&total) 3x amount of market rent. -Minimum credit score of 650 with no delinquencies (Co-signers are allowed for assistance in credit approval). For me to better assist you, please have the answers to the following questions: When is your move date?(is it flexible, if so how far in either direction)? Any pets(weight and breed)? Need parking? Budget(just rent)? What neighborhoods are you primarily interested in? Have you toured any properties yet?(so that I don't double up on my research) When are you available for a showing? For fastest response, please call or text Molly at 312-805-6567 If this specific unit does not fit your apartment needs there are a variety of options that would. My services to you are FREE and I look forward to assisting you in the search for your new home! Centrally located in Lakeshore East, this property is super transportation friendly, providing 10-minute walks to all CTA Trains, the Millennium Park Metra Station and Lake Shore Drive. If you are a “walker,” you’re in business! As one of the few apartment buildings connected to the underground Pedway, you’ll enjoy indoor access to restaurants, shops and offices within the Loop. You’ll also be less than 2 blocks away from the Chicago Riverwalk, the Lakefront Trail and Michigan Avenue giving you tons of activities to choose from. When you’re tired of walking, relax at the rooftop sunroom or do some grilling on the ground floor BBQ/picnic area. There’s also a fitness center, internet lounge and bicycle storage in addition to 24-hour security door staffing. Floor-to-ceiling windows, lots of closet space and very generous floor plans highlight these units. Select units have been remodeled with hardwood cabinets and plank flooring in the kitchens. The building offers on-site washers and dryers as well. Parking is available on-site at an additional charge. Cats are accepted throughout and dogs are welcome on all floors, but in limited quantities per floor (dog breed and weight restrictions apply). craigslist.title: Spacious 3BR – Section 8 Welcome – Accepts 2BR Voucher – Ready Now
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post Spacious and clean 3-bedroom apartment available now in Woodlawn. Rare First Floor 3 bedroom unit. Open kitchen with stainless steal appliances. Amazing location one block from Jewel-Osco, Green Line and University of Chicago on 62nd and Langley. ✔ Section 8 Welcome ✔ Will accept 2 bedroom voucher for 3 bedroom unit ✔ Ready for inspection immediately ✔ Fast approval and responsive management ✔ Move-In Fee waved for voucher holders ✔ No security deposit ✔ Heat and water included We are prepared to move quickly with qualified applicants. Units like this do not stay available long. 📞 Call or text (312) 498-5328 to schedule a showing This unit offers extra space for families, along with a quiet, well-maintained building and on-site maintenance, so repairs are handled quickly - often the same day. Conveniently located just one block from Jewel-Osco, with easy access to the Green Line, bus routes, and University of Chicago Hospital. "I honestly can’t believe how peaceful it is here. Even on weekends it’s calm. The janitor lives on site, so if something breaks, it usually gets fixed the same day. It makes a huge difference." — Undrah L. "The best part for me is that I don’t have to wait days for maintenance. Our janitor is here every day, and he’s super nice. It’s also surprisingly quiet for being in the city." — Lisa K. "I work from home and needed somewhere without constant noise. This place has been perfect. If I need anything fixed, I just knock on the janitor’s door and it’s taken care of fast." — Angela P. "It’s not fancy, but it’s clean, quiet, and things actually get fixed when you ask. You can tell someone’s looking after the building every day." — Betty H. We are prepared to move quickly with qualified applicants. Units like this do not stay available long. 📞 Call or text (312) 498-5328 to schedule a showing

craigslist.title: 3 bedroom / 2 bath unit across from FOSTER SCHOOL Evanston
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post Sun-drenched and spacious, this top full-floor 3-bedroom, 2-bath unit is centrally located in the heart of Evanston's vibrant Hill Arts District. Directly across from the new Foster School, this prime location offers exceptional access within a small 4-unit community. The apartment is filled with natural light, showcasing beautiful hardwood floors and a traditional layout. In addition to the 3 generous bedrooms, you can enjoy a formal dining room, formal living room, and a versatile back room that can serve as a mudroom or office. A rear door and staircase provide access to private, secure, fenced parking, which includes one dedicated space. You'll also benefit from convenient basement laundry and storage. Tenants share a private side yard, perfect for barbecues, games, and relaxation. Tenants are responsible for gas and electric while water is included. Only a short distance to the CTA Purple Line and Metra Union Pacific North Line at Noyes & Foster, with easy access to Green Bay Road and the bustling surrounding corridor. The Hill Arts District is renowned for its converted factories and industrial buildings, now housing a diverse mix of architects, photographers, graphic designers, tech firms, artists, and production kitchens, creating a dynamic entrepreneurial environment. You'll be close to neighborhood amenities, including Ladd Arboretum, Twiggs Park, and the Fleetwood-Jourdain Community Center. This is a unique opportunity to live in one of Evanston's most creative districts. Non-smoking building. No pets. Broker-owned.

craigslist.title: West Loop modern studio with in unit laundry
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post PROPERTY INFO ID: 358890872 Rent: $2,140 / Month Beds: 0 Bath: 1 Pet: Pet Friendly Parking:: attached garage This West Loop studio apartment is designed with efficiency and simplicity in mind, featuring a kitchen thoughtfully arranged along one wall to maximize usable space. The layout is easy to furnish and allows for comfortable separation between living and sleeping zones. Hardwood floors, quartz countertops, stainless steel appliances, and in-unit laundry create a clean, modern interior, while large windows bring in natural light. The building offers a strong mix of amenities, including co-working lounges, a fully equipped fitness center, and rooftop spaces for relaxing or gathering. A landscaped courtyard with grills provides an additional outdoor retreat. Pets are welcome, and an on-site dog wash station adds convenience. Garage parking with EV charging is available, along with additional parking options. Located in Fulton Market, you’re surrounded by top dining, nightlife, and convenient transit access. Set in the Fulton Market pocket of the West Loop, this unique community blends a newly constructed 12-story tower with a thoughtfully restored 1920s brick building. The result? Modern comfort with a side of historic character—exposed concrete ceilings, original charm, and plenty of sunlight. Choose from studio, one, two, and three-bedroom layouts, all featuring in-unit laundry, keyless entry, USB outlets, and sleek finishes throughout. Kitchens come dressed in quartz countertops, stainless steel appliances, and soft-close cabinetry, while wood-plank flooring ties everything together. Work-from-home days get a serious upgrade with onsite co-working spaces, complete with conference rooms. When it’s time to unwind, head to the indoor/outdoor rooftop lounges (the outdoor one has an amazing skyline view!) or enjoy the courtyard equipped with grills and a fire pit. A 24/7 fitness center keeps your routine covered. Commuting is a breeze thanks to the Ashland bus lines right outside your door, plus the CTA Green and Pink Lines at Ashland Station. The building is pet-friendly (dog wash included, breed restrictions apply) and offers both private garage parking with EV charging and additional onsite uncovered parking for an extra fee. The building offers a strong mix of amenities, including co-working lounges, a fully equipped fitness center, and rooftop spaces for relaxing or gathering. A landscaped courtyard with grills provides an additional outdoor retreat. Pets are welcome, and an on-site dog wash station adds convenience. Garage parking with EV charging is available, along with additional parking options. Located in Fulton Market, you’re surrounded by top dining, nightlife, and convenient transit access. Set in the Fulton Market pocket of the West Loop, this unique community blends a newly constructed 12-story tower with a thoughtfully restored 1920s brick building. The result? Modern comfort with a side of historic character—exposed concrete ceilings, original charm, and plenty of sunlight. Choose from studio, one, two, and three-bedroom layouts, all featuring in-unit laundry, keyless entry, USB outlets, and sleek finishes throughout. Kitchens come dressed in quartz countertops, stainless steel appliances, and soft-close cabinetry, while wood-plank flooring ties everything together. Work-from-home days get a serious upgrade with onsite co-working spaces, complete with conference rooms. When it’s time to unwind, head to the indoor/outdoor rooftop lounges (the outdoor one has an amazing skyline view!) or enjoy the courtyard equipped with grills and a fire pit. A 24/7 fitness center keeps your routine covered. Commuting is a breeze thanks to the Ashland bus lines right outside your door, plus the CTA Green and Pink Lines at Ashland Station. The building is pet-friendly (dog wash included, breed restrictions apply) and offers both private garage parking with EV charging and additional onsite uncovered parking for an extra fee. craigslist.title: 2 bed 1 bath offered furnished or non furnished
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post This luxurious 2 bedroom, 1 bathroom apartment has it all! Fabulous, modern kitchen with high-end finishes, stainless steel appliances, granite countertops with an island, 42' cabinets, beautiful bathroom featuring a double vanity, hardwood floor, in unit washer/dryer, and shared backyard. craigslist.title: Pet Friendly Humboldt Two Bed Unbeatable Deal! (3807 W. Thomas #1)
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post PROPERTY INFO ID: 440800705 Rent: $1,485 / Month Beds: 2 Bath: 1 Available Date: 07/01/2026 Pet: Pet Friendly Rent Includes:: Garbage, Water Parking:: street parking This two-bedroom, one-bath apartment at 3805 W Thomas offers a solid amount of space and classic Chicago character in the heart of Humboldt Park. With approximately 900 square feet and hardwood floors throughout, the layout feels comfortable and functional—ideal for anyone looking for room to spread out without stretching the budget. Both bedrooms are well-sized, and the living area offers flexibility for everyday living, work-from-home setups, or hosting friends. The apartment is pet friendly, making it a great option for renters who want a little extra space for themselves and their four-legged companions. Please note: there is no laundry on site, which is reflected in the value-driven pricing. Located on a residential stretch of Humboldt Park, the area is known for its tree-lined streets, strong community feel, and proximity to the park itself, along with easy access to local restaurants, cafés, neighborhood shops, and public transportation options. It’s a part of the city that feels lived-in, creative, and constantly evolving. A great opportunity for anyone seeking a straightforward, well-sized apartment in one of Chicago’s most dynamic neighborhoods. craigslist.title: Modern mini Studios!!! Steps from the Rivera Theatre!(4700 N. Racine)
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post PROPERTY INFO ID: 268940065 Rent: $1,150 / Month Beds: 0 Bath: 1 Available Date: 07/01/2026 Pet: Pet Friendly Parking:: street parking Former Vintage Uptown Hotel Now Completely Renovated Studios and 1 Bedrooms! * This historic gem underwent a massive gut rehab and conversion and now boasts 48 gorgeous studio and one bedroom apartments. * Completely renovated apartments that feature stainless steel kitchen appliances, beautiful new plumbing fixtures, 9′ high ceilings, large showers, & in-unit washer and dryer in select units. * Vintage building maintains all of the historic charm on the exterior Located in happening location at Leland and Racine * Walking distance to several great parks like Gooseberry Playlot Park, Aster Playlot Park, Arai Campus Park and Chase park. * Venture a little further east and you can walk to Montrose Beach, Montrose Dog Beach, Clarendon Park Community Center, and The Margate Fieldhouse. * Near some of the most famous music venues in Chicago including The Green Mill, The Riviera Theater, and The Aragon Ballroom. * Other popular neighborhood spots are Gigio’s Pizzeria, The Baton Show Lounge, Demera, Uptown Bikes, and Fat Cat Restaurant. * You’ll love being two blocks from Aldi, and Target for all of your daily necessities. Enjoy the convenience of public transportation when you live at The Darlington Apartments. * The Lawrence CTA train station with Red Line service is one block away to the north. The Wilson CTA train station is about 2 blocks south on Broadway. * At this station you will find service on the Red Line and Purple Line. * CTA bus routes nearby include: 36, 81, 151 * If you walk east to Marine Drive, you will find CTA bus routes: 136, 146, 148. Schools close to The Darlington Apartments are McCutcheon Elementary School, Lourdes School, Courtney School, Goudy School, James McPherson Public School, Chicago Waldorf School, and The Bridge International School. * Utility Bundle Fees: STUDIO $100 | 1-BEDROOM $120 Monthly RUBS : features trash, water, sewer, heat and internet. Additional storage is included in the rent. FEATURES Cats Ok On-Site Laundry Small Dog OK Storage Christopher T Jinks The Apartment Source 630-750-6090 www.apartmentsourcechicago.com I can show you multiple listings! The Apartment Source Call or text: 773.404.9900

craigslist.title: AWESOME tri-level 3 bed coach house w/ in-unit laundry, a/c
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post Rarely available and very unique tri-level coach house! The coach house is located in the rear of the property, it does not face the street Updated kitchen w/ stainless steel appliances, including dishwasher 3 spacious bedrooms (2 upstairs, 1 downstairs) Hardwood floors throughout the main living areas Carpeted bedrooms Central heat and a/c In-unit washer & dryer Generous closet space throughout Private front deck and shared patio space Good natural light **There is no off-street parking at this property. Cars will need to park on the street Water and trash are included. Tenant pays heat/gas and electricity. Cats okay, 2 max. No dogs Minimum credit score of 700 required $65 non-refundable application fee per person $500 one-time non-refundable move-in fee (flat fee, not per person) One-time non-refundable pet fee of $150 per cat When inquiring, please include your name, email and cell # and which apartment you are inquiring about MTD Property Management 4507 n. Lincoln, Chicago, IL 60625 (this is *not* the apartment address) 773-997-2624 (text or messaging here preferred @Natalie)
